title: revert: restore Sirius elevator game to its plain pre-#9607 look
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
Restores the Sirius Cybernetics Elevator Challenge to its original plain dark-terminal look, while **keeping the BYOP login working**.

### Why
Two stacked "UI enhancement" PRs changed the game's look without being requested:
- **#9607** (ChunkyPanda) â€” added floor background images, Lottie animations, `FloorBackground`/`FloorEffects`/`AnimationToggle` + ~20 binary assets
- **#9819** (Elliot) â€” swapped the ASCII elevator for a boxed `ElevatorShaft`, added `LoginScreen`/`UserMenu`, rewrote auth

### What this does
- Restores `index.tsx`, `logic.ts`, `types.ts`, `globals.css` to the pre-#9607 baseline (`ecae75949`): ASCII elevator everywhere, an explicit **"Login with Pollinations"** button (no auto-redirect), no photo backgrounds/effects
- Removes the components both PRs added (`FloorBackground`, `FloorEffects`, `FloorEffectsLottie`, `AnimationToggle`, `ElevatorShaft`, `LoginScreen`, `UserMenu`) + the `settings` hook
- Removes the ~20 floor/cover PNG + `.lottie` assets and the now-unused `@lottiefiles/dotlottie-react` dependency
- **Keeps** the current `app_key` BYOP auth in `hooks/ui.ts` (incl. the #11830 app-key fix) â€” login still works via the button

### Verification
- `tsc` + `vite build` pass; bundle drops **601 kB â†’ 170 kB**
- No floor/shaft/lottie markers remain in the bundle
- Loading no longer auto-redirects â€” shows the plain login screen with the button
- biome clean

Net **+322 / âˆ’1487** lines (mostly deleting the two PRs' cosmetic layers).

Supersedes the partial #11832 (which only reverted #9819 and had an instant-redirect regression).

gist.headline: Back to the terminal
gist.blurb: The Sirius Cybernetics Elevator Challenge is returning to its retro roots. We've stripped away the heavy graphics to bring back the classic, lightning-fast ASCII terminal experience.
gist.summary: The Sirius Cybernetics Elevator Challenge app has been reverted to its original plain dark-terminal ASCII aesthetic, dropping the bundle size from 601 kB to 170 kB while keeping BYOP login intact.
gist.impact: Players will experience a much faster, distraction-free retro interface with the removal of background images and animations.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee interacting with a classic retro terminal. The focus is on lightweight, old-school ASCII aesthetics. The chunky monitor robot is present, holding a feather to represent the drastically reduced bundle size.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing retro hacker glasses, typing on a glowing green CRT monitor displaying an ASCII elevator. The chunky monitor-head robot stands nearby holding a glowing feather to represent a lighter payload. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and dark purple (#110518) gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
